gaps: Lack of explicit risk management process for AI decision-making
Insufficient transparency in contract review and compliance tracking capabilities
Unclear criteria for escalation rules and compliance flags
No documented process for continuous monitoring and improvement of AI performance
recommendations: Implement a risk management framework to identify, assess, and mitigate potential risks associated with AI decision-making
Develop and maintain transparent documentation of contract review and compliance tracking processes
Establish clear criteria and thresholds for escalation rules and compliance flags
Develop a continuous monitoring and improvement process to ensure AI performance aligns with organizational objectives and ISO/IEC 42001 requirements

certificate.notes: Guardian review completed. Risk level: high. Quality: 100%

remediation_plan: ISO 42001: Lack of explicit risk management process for AI decision-making
